body_preview: - Issue #93 ("Close resolved issues #89, #91, #92") keeps reverting because the verification gate rejects it with "task changes do not overlap planned Files entries". The task has Files: "(none — GitHub issue management only, no source edits)". - The root cause is `external_only_planned()` in scripts/task_verification_gate.py line 38-42: it only recognizes p
expected_evidence: Issue #93 stops reverting when re-attempted — the verification gate accepts the external evidence from gh CLI operations. The `task_verification_rate` gnome rises as non-code tasks can now pass. Future task state counts show fewer `reverted_scope_mismatch` entries for
title: Broaden verification gate to accept issue-management and non-code tasks
